original_statement: which manufacturer(s) is/are listed the least on this chart?
mutated_statement: which provider(s) is/are listed the least and the most on this chart?
mutation_analysis: [Entity substitution] + [Scope expansion]: "manufacturer(s)" generalized to "provider(s)" | added "and the most" to request both minimum and maximum (which manufacturer(s) is/are listed the least on this chart? → which provider(s) is/are listed the least and the most on this chart?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 正确识别并响应指令扩展（非矛盾情形）
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中的陈述识别关键信息：日志中simple_query返回了各厂商计数并在judge_thought中逐项列出（New Flyer:2, Gillig:2, MCI:3, NABI:4, Van Hool:11），并明确结论“最少为New Flyer和Gillig，最多为Van Hool”。Agent的具体表现为直接执行计数查询、汇总结果并同时回答“最少”和“最多”的请求，未表现出对指令矛盾的识别或回避。由于变异问题只是将实体泛化并扩展了查询范围（从仅询问最少到同时询问最少和最多），并不存在自相矛盾，Agent正确处理并给出完整答案，故归类为“正确识别并响应指令扩展（非矛盾情形）”。
